name: Omnicom Group Inc.
description: Omnicom Group Inc. is a leading global marketing and corporate communications holding company. Headquartered in the United States, the firm provides a comprehensive range of services, including advertising, strategic media planning and buying, digital and interactive marketing, public relations, and specialty communications. Through its extensive network of agencies and brands, such as BBDO, DDB, TBWA, and Omnicom Media Group, the company delivers integrated, data-driven solutions to clients worldwide. Omnicom focuses on leveraging creativity and technology to help brands build meaningful connections with consumers across diverse markets and platforms.
